organization: Okra Leaf Disease Detection using DeiT and Mistral-7B
description: Conducting MSCS research on okra leaf disease detection using Vision Transformers and LLM-based explanation generation.
points: Fine-tuned a pretrained DeiT model for okra leaf disease classification under limited-data conditions.
Integrated Mistral-7B LLM to generate human-readable explanations of model predictions.
Conducted experimental research using PyTorch and transformer-based deep learning frameworks.
Focused on explainable AI, agriculture AI, few-shot learning, and adaptive computer vision systems.

description: Building and customizing web-based solutions using React, PHP Laravel, WordPress, and MERN stack technologies.
points: Developed responsive websites and frontend interfaces using React and JavaScript.
Customized WordPress websites for freelance clients.
Worked with PHP Laravel and basic MERN stack development workflows.
